'''Wen'he'dinae''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GG12" /> located in the [[Wen'he'dinae system/Legends|Wen'he'dinae system]], a part of the [[Eidoloni sector/Legends|Eidoloni sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet had several seasons and was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a multitude of [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] creatures.<ref name="GG12" />

The [[Cha'wen'he]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Bird/Legends|bird]]-like herbivores, evolved on Wen'he'dinae, with the planet's numerous predators forcing the species to become nervous, excitable, and prone to sudden, quick motions. The Cha'wen'he were physiologically adapted to both [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] and cold climates, and those members of the species that resided on its homeworld roamed the planet according to its seasons.<ref name="GG12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wen'he'dinae was created by [[Lisa Smedman]] and introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG12" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Wen'he'dinae [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square L-16.<ref name="TEA" />
